case_title: JESSICA LEGGETT VS. TAE S CHO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGGETT, JESSICA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED DEC-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LEGGETT, JESSICA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGGETT, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LEGGETT, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT APPEARED. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. CLERK J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGGETT, JESSICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00, DEFENDANT WAS REQUIRED TO ITEMIZE THE FLOOR DAMAGE FOLLOWING PRE-MOVE-OUT INSPECTION BUT DID NOT. SO NO DEDUCTION FOR THE FLOOR COULD FOLLOW. EARLIER $500 CONTRIBUTION TOWARD DAMAGE BY PLAINTIFF WILL NOT BE DISTURBED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,720.22 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 3/4/16 AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, TAE S
